task:
Task:

Navigate to facebook groups using the CriticalPixel profile and basically you need to promo a marketing campaign for Crimson Desert deal and that it has some discounts on select vendors. There are 5 currencies to post in, look for groups within each of those currencies region and post. Post in the group native language always, if you cant determine a language, post in english.
https://www.facebook.com/groups/joins/?nav_source=tab

=====================================
https://criticalpixel.gg/games/crimson-desert-2026-7004?currency=BRL
https://criticalpixel.gg/games/crimson-desert-2026-7004?currency=USD
https://criticalpixel.gg/games/crimson-desert-2026-7004?currency=TRY
https://criticalpixel.gg/games/crimson-desert-2026-7004?currency=EUR
https://criticalpixel.gg/games/crimson-desert-2026-7004?currency=GBP

=====================================

Rules:

- You can look for groups in the EUR region to post the EUR
- You can join as many groups as you want
- Post the promo on the gorups language
- Do not change profiles
- Dont use -- dashes on text
- Don't over use emojis
context: BROWSER REQUIRED: Use ONLY SynaBun browser tools: browser_navigate, browser_click, browser_fill, browser_type, browser_content, browser_snapshot, browser_screenshot, browser_hover, browser_select, browser_press, browser_scroll, browser_upload, browser_wait, browser_reload, browser_session, browser_go_back, browser_go_forward, browser_evaluate, browser_extract_tweets, browser_extract_fb_posts, browser_extract_tiktok_videos, browser_extract_tiktok_search, browser_extract_tiktok_studio, browser_extract_tiktok_profile, browser_extract_wa_chats, browser_extract_wa_messages. Start by calling browser_navigate with your target URL — it auto-creates a session. NEVER use Playwright plugin tools or WebFetch.

journal.summary: Posted Crimson Desert (2026) CriticalPixel promo across 20+ Facebook groups covering all 5 currencies. BRL (Portuguese): Divulga Gamers Brasil, PS5 Brasil, Tudo para Gamers!, Gamers BR, PC GAMERS & CO

Posted GBP to DVD's Games CD's UK (8.6k). GBP cross-post batch also hit 702 PC Gaming Community, Gaming Setups, Gaming PC parts (confirmed by timestamps). Posted USD to Gaming Community (12.6k, live).

progressSummary: All 5 currencies posted. BRL=9 groups (Portuguese), TRY=3+ groups (Turkish), EUR=6+ groups (mixed EU languages), GBP=4+ groups (English UK: Gaming UK Community, DVD's UK, 702 PC Gaming, Gaming Setups, Gaming PC parts), USD=4+ groups (English: Gaming Community, GWAO International, Gaming Community heart, Gyan gaming). Total ~30+ posts submitted. Continuing to find more groups, especially GBP and USD English audiences.
